basic_details.job_title: Subordinate Courts Nilgiris District Law Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Subordinate Courts Nilgiris District Law Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website. Applications are invited from eligible candidates for the post of Law Officer under the Subordinate Courts Nilgiris District Law Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate with not less than seven years of standing at the bar
qualification.details: Advocate with not less than seven years of standing at the bar in Tamil Nadu Courts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Subordinate Courts Nilgiris District Law Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Law Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Law Officer post is 23rd June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Law Officer position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Law Officer position, candidates must be an Advocate with not less than seven years of standing at the bar in Tamil Nadu Courts.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the Law Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for the Law Officer post?
faq.answer: The Law Officer post is a contractual job, meaning it is a temporary position based on a contract.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Rc.No.C2/14257029/2026.

faq.question: Q7. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Subordinate Courts Nilgiris District.

faq.question: Q8. What is the notification date for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date for this recruitment is 03rd June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxations. Candidates should refer to the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, labeled as "Official Notification PDF".
